abstract.p: We assessed structural maturity, contractile function, electrophysiology, and gene expression in hiPSC-CMs.

sec.title: Introduction
sec.p: Induced pluripotent stem cell-derived cardiomyocytes are widely used for disease modeling.

sec.title: Electrophysiology assessment
sec.p: Action potential duration (APD) and calcium transient duration (CaTD) were measured. Electrophysiology metrics included APD90 and calcium transient amplitude.

sec.title: Contractile function
sec.p: Contractile force was assessed using traction force microscopy. Peak twitch force and maximal force were recorded.

table-wrap.caption: Contractile metrics used in the study

sec.title: Gene expression markers
sec.p: Structural maturity was evaluated using gene expression markers including MYH6, MYH7, and TNNT2.
